description: Tracks product-building and design tool repositories from GitHub signals.

items.description: 🙃   A delightful community-driven (with 2,500+ contributors) framework for managing your zsh configuration. Includes 300+ optional plugins (rails, git, macOS, hub, docker, homebrew, node, php, python, etc), 140+ themes to spice up your morning, and an auto-update tool that makes it easy to keep up with the latest updates from the community.
The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
CLI proxy that reduces LLM token consumption by 60-90% on common dev commands. Single Rust binary, zero dependencies
The world's best AI personal assistant for email. Open source app to help you reach inbox zero fast.
MacOS Niri and Hyprland inspired tiling window manager that's developer signed and notorized (safe for managed enterprise environments). Aiming for parity and extra innovation.

NEO Emacs (WIP): A GPU-powered Emacs written in Rust with a modern display engine.  Aiming for modern design/multi-threaded Elisp, 10x performance and 100% Emacs compatibility. 🚀  Inline 4K images/4K videos/WPEWebKit using GPU acceleration, DMA-BUF, ZERO-COPY. Rich animation effects support.
Your local AI session library. Collects sessions from Claude Code, Codex CLI, Gemini CLI (and more) — browsable and ⌘K-searchable.
Open-source context engine that catches AI hallucinations and cuts your token bill 70–95%. The only AI helper that shows its work. Claude · Cursor · Codex,GPT & Custom Providers
Browser extension which gives you more control over YouTube by adding missing options and UI improvements - for desktop & mobile browsers
Set up your Mac dev environment in one command — CLI + Web Dashboard + Team sharing
A powerful command-line interface for Atlassian Confluence

An AI-powered Personal Knowledge Assistance system with a nine-person AI team baked in. Plain markdown. Any LLM. Yours forever. Picks up where you left off across sessions. Built on the ICOR® methodology.
Self-hosted capture layer to save anything from anywhere.

Marking：现代化跨平台 Markdown 编辑器 - 专业级编辑体验 + 可视化表格编辑  + 强大导出功能 | Modern cross-platform Markdown editor with professional editing, visual table editor, and powerful export | MarKing: A modern, professional cross-platform Markdown editor with stunning UI, DOCX/PDF export, and native performance.
